message:
feat(cli): add sqlite3 quick_check rescue and new integration tests

When the Rust-side integrity probe fails but the sqlite3 CLI
quick_check passes, the doctor now rescues the database as healthy,
preventing false negatives with frankensqlite's custom VFS.

Add integration tests for agents list --json by human_key and
macros start-session --json, plus a unit test for doctor behavior
with orphaned foreign key references.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
